crime._comment: Any city's Socrata open-data portal. Geocoded but usually published with a lag, so this is the context layer, not live alerts. To use another city: set domain + incidents_dataset to its crime dataset, and map fields to that dataset's column names (the date/offense/address/location-point columns).

scanner._comment: Broadcastify live audio (real-time alert layer). Free account required; stream URLs are session-gated, so the script logs in to fetch them. Add one or more feeds; each runs its own capture. directory_url is the Broadcastify listing the GUI's feed picker reads — set it to your metro/county page (browse from broadcastify.com/listen).

alerts._comment: near_streets: lowercased street names within/around your radius matched against transcribed dispatch audio. priority_keywords: incident types that always alert regardless of location. notify_command: optional path to your own notifier, called as `<command> <message> <severity>`; leave empty for native macOS notifications.
